title: rosa rubiginosa var. sepium
intro: Rosa rubiginosa var. sepium, also known as the wild dog rose or dog rose, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Rosa rubiginosa var. sepium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in digestion, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce stress levels. Rosa rubiginosa var. sepium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and salves.
